title: rubus × lineatoalpestris
intro: Rubus × lineatoalpestris, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × lineatoalpestris include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Rubus × lineatoalpestris can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
